title: Me to You Cute Mother's Day Card For Mum, Softly Drawn Tatty Teddy Holding Flowers 6 x 9 inches - Official Collection
features: CUTE MOTHER'S DAY CARD FOR MUM - featuring an adorable illustration of Tatty Teddy holding up three pretty flowers, this is a card that's sure to make her smile!
UNIQUE SOFTLY DRAWN ARTWORK - this gorgeous illustration is lovingly created in the Softly Drawn style, with muted pastel colours and Tatty Teddy looking cuter than ever
PRETTY INSIDE COVER - open up the card to reveal a pink and white printed background with the message 'Happy Mother's Day with lots of love' and plenty of room to write your own words
CARD MEASURES 6 X 9 INCHES - printed on top quality board and finished to the highest standards, this is a super cute card to treasure on Mother's Day and beyond

GENUINE ME TO YOU GREETING CARD – unique and instantly recognisable with grey fur, a cute blue nose and patches, Tatty Teddy has captured millions of hearts all over the world with a timeless message of love, happiness and friendship
description: Give Mum a card she's sure to cherish on Mother's Day and beyond. This cute design from Me to You features a Softly Drawn illustration of Tatty Teddy holding three flowers to spell out the word 'MUM'. Open the card to reveal a stylish polka dot background with plenty of space to write your own message. Printed on premium board and with envelope included. Size 6 x 9 inches.
